question_text: Months until Warrant of Fitness is due
help_text: Enter the number of months remaining. If expired or due soon, create a maintenance task or note it for the Ops Manager.

help_text: Enter the number of months remaining. If expired or due soon, create a maintenance task or note it for the Ops Manager.

question_text: Vehicle mileage / odometer reading
help_text: Record the vehicle mileage. You can also use the inspection odometer field.

question_text: Kilometres remaining on Road User Charges - diesel vehicles only
help_text: Diesel vehicles only. Leave blank or mark N/A if not applicable.

question_text: Wheel nuts checked with wheel spanner for tightness
help_text: Use a wheel spanner to check tightness of all wheel nuts.

question_text: Vehicle checks - any other issue to note?
help_text: Select Yes if anything needs the Ops Manager to review, and describe it in notes.

question_text: Vehicle exterior washed - wash mix applied, painted surfaces brushed, and rinsed
help_text: Regular cleaning task to keep the vehicle presentable and in good condition.

question_text: Vehicle tray cleaned - items removed and tray pressure washed clean
help_text: Remove all items from the tray before pressure washing clean.

question_text: Vehicle cab tidied - rubbish removed and interior surfaces wiped down
help_text: Remove rubbish, tidy the cab, wipe down surfaces, and add cab photos here where useful.

question_text: Truck and tray photos uploaded after cleaning
help_text: Use the inspection photo upload field to attach images after cleaning.
